method: Synthesis of verified ~23-subsystem comparison of corlinman vs claude-code, hermes-agent, openclaw. Only CONFIRMED and UNCERTAIN gaps retained; already-covered and intentionally-omitted refuted+dropped. path:line claims spot-verified against the live tree (cache_control=0 hits, mainline adapters carry only _retry_after_ms_from_exc not with_retry, is_stale returns False for unrecorded paths, calculator _BIN_OPS has no ast.Call, _CONTEXT_BUDGET flat 120k, no SendMessage/coordinator symbols).
note: The orchestrator's source confirmed_gaps array was truncated mid-entry at no-context-overflow-shrink-retry (E5). That gap and all gaps described only inside subsystem summaries (provider-auth, permissions, hooks, subagents, mcp, skills, slash-commands, plugins, memory-rag, self-evolution, persona-life, channels, voice-multimodal, goals-cron, identity-trust, observability, config-settings, canvas-render) are reconstructed from their fully-specified fields and the project's own RESEARCH_AGENT_PARITY.md grid (A1-A6, B1-B13, C1-C12, D1-D7, E1-E10).

confirmed_gaps.title: No cross-model fallback chain on overload
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: gateway/routes/chat.py:114-147 ModelRedirect is one-shot alias resolution at request entry; agent_servicer.py:1262-1266 builds ONE ReasoningLoop; reasoning_loop.py:1046-1078 on exception yields ErrorEvent+return, no provider swap+replay; failover.py is error-taxonomy only.
confirmed_gaps.fix: fallback_model field on alias/binding + overload counter in servicer + turn-replay-with-new-provider branch around loop.run() (strip thinking signatures).

confirmed_gaps.title: Lifecycle HookBus is observe-only — no blocking Stop/PreToolUse hooks
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: corlinman-hooks/bus.py:51 HookSubscriber returns None; emit()/emit_nonblocking() return None; event.py:228-229 PreToolDispatch is fire-and-forget; reasoning_loop.py:1094-1104 turn-end has no veto path; RESEARCH_AGENT_PARITY.md:86 D3=none.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add a decision/collect return to select events (PreToolDispatch, new Stop/turn-end event), thread into _run_one_round + the no-tool-calls exit; add hook discovery (HOOK.yaml/handler.py).

confirmed_gaps.title: No persistent re-addressable teammates / coordinator mode with SendMessage
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: supervisor.py:638-728 awaits one TaskResult then releases slot; api.py:80-176 TaskSpec/TaskResult have no continuation; blackboard.py:60-186 is a scratchpad not a message bus; zero SendMessage/coordinator_mode/TeammateIdle symbols in python/packages.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Child registry keyed by agent id + durable child inbox + SendMessage/continue tool + relaxed join-only lifecycle + coordinator system prompt/mode persistence.

confirmed_gaps.title: No token-budget / diminishing-returns auto-continue for autonomous runs
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: reasoning_loop.py:1094-1104 only non-error terminal is 'if not tool_calls_this_round'; only guard is rounds<_MAX_ROUNDS (line 990, default 60); inject_user_message (814) exists but nothing auto-nudges.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Optional BudgetTracker that injects a 'continue, budget remaining' user message when turnTokens<budget*0.9 and not diminishing; gate behind autonomous/scheduled runs.

confirmed_gaps.title: session.py Session bundle and cancel.combine remain unimplemented stubs
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: session.py:1-17 is docstring+logger, no Session class (TODO M2); cancel.py:23-36 implements only with_timeout, combine() is TODO M2 in docstring, absent.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Implement Session (bundles session_key/trace/messages/cancel) and cancel.combine (merge asyncio cancel scopes); low impact, current single-Event cancel works.

confirmed_gaps.title: read_file cannot read images, PDFs, or Jupyter notebooks
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: coding/files.py:55-85 schema 'Read a UTF-8 text file' offset/limit only; files.py:228 path.read_text(utf-8,errors=replace) unconditional; search.py:53-56 lists .png/.jpg/.pdf as skip; zero ipynb handling.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Ext-dispatch in dispatch_read_file: base64 image content blocks, PDF page extraction (pages param), notebook cell parsing; change ToolResult path to accept content-block lists not just strings (shared with read-image-pdf-notebook in tool-craft).

confirmed_gaps.title: No vision / image-analysis tool (only generation)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: image/ has plain.py/generate.py/dispatch.py only; zero vision_analyze/analyze_image symbols; BUILTIN_TOOLS agent_servicer.py:229-246 has no analyze entry.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add a vision_analyze tool (url/path/attachment -> multimodal describe/OCR) following the image_generate module shape.

confirmed_gaps.title: No agent-callable persistent-memory or session-search tool
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: server-side _recall_memory/_store_memory (agent_servicer.py:2889-2970) are automatic not agent-callable; memory_write (background_review.py:87,692) is curator-only, not in BUILTIN_TOOLS; rag/ is offline epa_backfill only.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Expose a callable memory tool (notes+profile read/write) and a session_search tool (BM25 recall over prior turns); the LocalSqliteHost FTS5 store already exists.

confirmed_gaps.title: No text-to-speech / audio-generation tool
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: agent_servicer.py:367-388 catalog has no TTS; no *tts*/*speech* tool module; CHANGELOG 2771 TTS is a provider endpoint, routes_voice/persistence.py:24 tts_audio_path_for is server-side voice pipeline.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Agent-callable text_to_speech tool emitting an audio attachment; reuse the voice provider backends.

confirmed_gaps.title: No in-process code-execution / REPL tool
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: coding/__init__.py:71-98 CODING_TOOLS has no execute_code; shell.py:202 run_shell spawns fresh subprocess, no session persistence, no in-process tool calls.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Optional execute_code tool with a persistent session that can call other tools to batch round-trips (downgraded — run_shell covers the basic case).

confirmed_gaps.title: Calculator is arithmetic-only (no scientific/symbolic math)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: web/calculator.py:37-44 _BIN_OPS maps only +,-,*,/,//,%,**; _eval_node:91-125 raises on ast.Call/Name/Attribute; schema says 'arithmetic expression'; no sympy/scipy in tree.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add a sympy/statistics-backed scientific mode (sqrt/sin/log/solve/integrate/matrices) behind a safe allowlist, OR a separate scientific_calculator tool.

confirmed_gaps.title: web_fetch returns stripped HTML with no prompt-driven extraction
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: web/fetch.py:70-106 schema url+max_chars only; dispatch:279-302 html_to_text regex strip then truncate; no prompt param, no markdown conversion, no model pass.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Optional prompt param + HTML->markdown + small/fast-model extraction returning a focused answer; surface next_offset for paging.

confirmed_gaps.title: read_file is text-only — no image/PDF/notebook reads (duplicate of builtin-tools B2)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: coding/files.py:228 read_text(utf-8,errors=replace) returns {content,lines,shown,truncated}; no ext branching; reasoning_loop attachment path (1762-1772) is user-attachments not tool results.
confirmed_gaps.fix: SAME as read-multimodal-image-pdf-notebook — implement once; requires ToolResult content-block plumbing through the reasoning loop.

confirmed_gaps.title: edit_file does not require the file to have been read first
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: files.py:433 only checks state.is_stale(path); _filestate.py:65-81 is_stale returns False when there is NO record, so a never-read file edits blind; no has_record/is_known surface.
confirmed_gaps.fix: In dispatch_edit_file, when state is supplied and there is no record for an existing path, reject with 'File has not been read yet. Read it first.' (mirror FileEditTool.ts:281).

confirmed_gaps.title: run_shell is synchronous-only — no background/long-running task mode
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: shell.py:61-62 _DEFAULT_TIMEOUT=30/_MAX_TIMEOUT=60 hard caps; dispatch_run_shell:280-312 wait_for(communicate()) blocking; SIGKILL at 60s; no task registry. Deprioritized per CHANGELOG D4 for builtin-tools subsystem.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Background spawn path + task-handle/poll tool surface; conflicts with the deliberate D4 deprioritization, so confirm intent first.

confirmed_gaps.title: read_file silently truncates instead of an actionable pre-read token gate
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: files.py:243-252 truncates at MAX_READ_CHARS=60000 and sets truncated:true with no next_offset/guidance; reasoning_loop.py:203 second 8K cap; no token estimate, no rejection.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Surface an actionable 'file too large, use offset/limit or search_files' message + next_offset on truncation.

confirmed_gaps.title: edit_file does no quote/CRLF/BOM normalization before matching
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: files.py:439 read_text(utf-8) no BOM/CRLF/quote handling; fuzzy tiers 466-469 only rstrip/strip; write-back 517 text-mode strips \r silently converting CRLF files.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Match-time normalization (curly->straight quotes, CRLF->LF, UTF-16 BOM detect) + round-trip original encoding/EOL on write.

confirmed_gaps.title: Planned tier-4 block-anchor fuzzy matcher was never implemented
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: files.py:466-469 only rstrip/strip tiers; _fuzzy_line_matches:353-385 requires every line equal; PLAN_AGENT_PARITY_IMPL.md:187-189 specified tier-4 (first/last-line anchor + interior drift) but it never shipped.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add tier-4 block-anchor matcher (anchor first+last line exact, tolerate interior drift).

confirmed_gaps.title: No Anthropic prompt caching (cache_control: ephemeral) or cache-usage accounting
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: anthropic_provider.py:357-364 plain system/tools/messages; line 420 done chunk has NO usage at all; zero cache_control hits in non-test src (verified); RESEARCH_AGENT_PARITY.md:22 A3=no cache headers.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add cache_control:{type:ephemeral} to trailing system block/last tool/stable prefix; plumb cache_read_input_tokens & cache_creation_input_tokens into the done-event usage (base.py reserves cached_input_tokens); add cache-break detection on compaction.

confirmed_gaps.title: Compaction budget is a flat 120k constant, ignoring each model's context_length
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: reasoning_loop.py:221-224 flat _CONTEXT_BUDGET=120000; :1029 passes budget=_CONTEXT_BUDGET unconditionally; declarative.py:61/395-399 parses context_length (advisory) but zero runtime consumers.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Thread active model's context_length into the budget = context_length - reserved_output_tokens; replaces the flat constant.

confirmed_gaps.title: No conversation history dedup (duplicate-turn filtering)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: only unrelated dedups exist (context_assembler.py:252-276 toolbox tokens; persona/life.py:717 topics; agent_servicer.py:1174-1183 one-time leading-turn strip); reasoning_loop accumulates turns with no content-hash check.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Content-hash dedup pass over recent N turns at history-extend/assembly time, preserving tool_call/tool_result pairing.

confirmed_gaps.title: Compacted/summarized history is never persisted as a durable compaction boundary
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: reasoning_loop.py:1027-1041 messages=_compact_history(...) is a local var, never written back; resume (agent_servicer.py:1112-1184) replays raw journal turns; journal schema has no boundary column; PLAN_UI_FIXES.md:189 defers per-session compaction checkpoint.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Persist the compaction result (summary block + boundary marker) to journal; load from boundary on subsequent turns/resume so steady-state context is O(1).

confirmed_gaps.title: Token estimation is a chars//4 heuristic, not a real tokenizer
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: reasoning_loop.py:332-338 _estimate_tokens=chars//4; _estimate_chars:290-329 ignores images/files; thresholds (388/411 at 0.60/0.95) ride this; zero tiktoken/tokenizer deps. Badly under/over-counts CJK (primary user base) and image-heavy chats.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Swap in a real tokenizer (tiktoken OpenAI-family / anthropic count_tokens / HF for Claude) or at minimum per-block estimation with ~2000-token image sizing + CJK-aware ratio + padding.

confirmed_gaps.title: Exponential backoff / Retry-After not wired into the mainline model-call path
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: _retry.with_retry used ONLY by codex_provider.py:440 first-event; agent_client/retry.py is gRPC-transport-only; all 8 mainline adapters carry only _retry_after_ms_from_exc (header parse) not with_retry (verified anthropic:700-787/openai:441-527); reasoning_loop.py:611,1274 call chat_stream directly; error propagates to _error_frame and stops.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Wrap chat_stream attempts in a backoff loop consulting RateLimitError.retry_after_ms + OverloadedError (500ms base, 32s cap, jitter, Retry-After override); reuse the existing provider-agnostic with_retry — this is wiring, not new primitives.

confirmed_gaps.title: No model fallback chain on sustained overload (duplicate of loop-cross-model-fallback)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: AliasEntry specs.py:173-186 has no fallback field; ModelRedirect chat.py:114-145 is alias-resolution only with no overload state; _retry.py:154-179 retries SAME model on 529; RESEARCH_AGENT_PARITY.md:99 E4=none; ModelRedirect.json is docstring-only aspiration.
confirmed_gaps.fix: SAME as loop-cross-model-fallback — per-alias/per-agent fallback_model chain + overload-count + re-resolve+replay loop.

confirmed_gaps.title: Context-overflow is terminal — no dynamic max_tokens shrink-and-retry
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: anthropic_provider.py:777 / openai_provider.py:517 raise ContextOverflowError on 400+'context'; agent_servicer.py:3571 context_overflow is terminal (not in retryable set at 3557); no code parses the numeric limit or adjusts max_tokens (zero shrink-retry symbols verified).
confirmed_gaps.fix: Parse 'input + max_tokens exceed context limit: A + B > C', compute availableContext = limit - input - buffer, set maxTokensOverride, retry the request; pre-emptive _compact_history reduces but does not eliminate this.

confirmed_gaps.title: No per-model USD cost computation (tokens aggregated, dollars not)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: _CostMeter aggregates tokens; estimated_cost_usd/cost_status columns written only by tests; update_turn_cost has no production caller; sole USD math is a hardcoded Haiku-rate fallback in sessions_cost.py; TurnComplete built without cost.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Per-model MODEL_COSTS table + calculateUSDCost (input/output/cache-read/cache-creation) wired into TurnComplete + update_turn_cost; depends on usage actually being emitted (see prompt-caching gap).

confirmed_gaps.title: OAuth-subscription chat omits the Claude Code identity headers/prompt Anthropic's edge requires
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: AnthropicProvider does not send anthropic-beta: oauth-2025-04-20, user-agent: claude-cli/..., x-app: cli, nor the 'You are Claude Code' system-prompt prefix, so OAuth-bearer chat likely 500s in production.
confirmed_gaps.fix: When the active credential is an OAuth bearer, inject the four identity headers + the system-prompt prefix on chat_stream.

confirmed_gaps.title: Anthropic on-use OAuth refresh is a no-op on the live request path; no 401 recovery
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: _refresh_sync returns None inside a running loop; chat_stream has no async pre-refresh or 401-recovery for Anthropic (unlike Codex which has single-flight refresh).
confirmed_gaps.fix: Async pre-refresh of an expiring Anthropic OAuth token before chat_stream + reactive 401 refresh-and-retry, mirroring the Codex provider.

confirmed_gaps.title: Claude Code credential import misses the macOS Keychain (CC >=2.1.114)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: import reads only ~/.claude/.credentials.json; newer Claude Code stores creds in the macOS Keychain which corlinman never reads.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add a macOS Keychain read path (security find-generic-password) to the Claude Code import flow.

confirmed_gaps.title: Builtin permission gate has no 'ask' action (allow/deny/log only)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: permission.py allow/deny/log only; approval_gate.py is a pure stub; a builtin tool can never trigger an interactive prompt the way Bash/Edit do in the reference.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add an 'ask' verdict that routes through the existing plugin ApprovalGate prompt-and-wait machinery; unify the two disjoint gate systems.

confirmed_gaps.title: Permission rules are tool-NAME-level only — no per-argument/command-pattern matching
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: rules match tool name only — no run_shell(rm:*) / prefix / wildcard / exact-command rules, no env-strip or compound-command split; the one run_shell guard is a hardcoded regex in shell.py.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add ruleContent/pattern matching (prefix/wildcard/exact), command splitting, env stripping; last-match-wins precedence.

confirmed_gaps.title: No pre-tool auto-approve classifier
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: no speculative safe-command classifier exists at all.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Optional classifier that auto-approves provably-safe calls to avoid interrupts (low priority for a chat bot).

confirmed_gaps.title: No permission-mode concept or layered rule sources/org policy
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: env-config-only, no acceptEdits/plan/bypass/dontAsk mode, no layered precedence or org policyLimits.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Permission-mode enum + layered rule sources (user/project/local/org) with precedence.

confirmed_gaps.title: No user-extensible/discoverable/decision-returning hook layer
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: bus is observe-only; no HookRegistry/HOOK.yaml/handler.py (grep nothing); no emit_collect/decision path; SessionStart/End/Reset, PreCompact/PostCompact, Stop not emitted; PLAN_AGENT_PARITY_IMPL.md T3.2 deliberately deferred the blocking half.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Hook discovery (~/.hermes/hooks-style {HOOK.yaml,handler.py}) + emit_collect decision path + the missing lifecycle emit points. Overlaps loop-blocking-lifecycle-hooks.

confirmed_gaps.title: Background-dispatch infra fully built but deliberately inert
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: production run_child_factory raises; run_in_background is unadvertised; synthetic <task-notification> completion injection has no journal impl so always skips.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Wire the run_child_factory + a real journal-backed task-notification; this is partially intentional pending a use case.

confirmed_gaps.title: Model has no stop/cancel tool for children (operator HTTP kill only)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: only an operator HTTP kill route exists; no model-callable stop tool; no periodic in-flight progress summarization.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Model-callable subagent_stop tool + optional periodic child-progress summary. Overlaps coordinator gap.

confirmed_gaps.title: Outbound MCP client can't speak ecosystem Streamable-HTTP/SSE; needs hand-authored manifests; no OAuth/resources-as-tools/reconnect
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: _normalise_ws_url only rewrites http->ws and dials a websocket (corlinman-to-corlinman); real external servers (context7, mcp-remote) use Streamable-HTTP/SSE; calling an MCP tool requires a hand-authored corlinman-side mcp-kind plugin manifest per tool; no ListMcpResources/ReadMcpResource agent tools, no OAuth, no reconnection.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add Streamable-HTTP + SSE transports, OAuth, auto tools/list -> tool surface (drop the per-tool manifest requirement), resources/prompts agent tools, reconnection.

confirmed_gaps.title: Full skill body injected every turn — no progressive disclosure / model-driven selection / Skill tool
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: context_assembler.py:432 injects full body_markdown of every skill_ref every turn; no description-in-context+on-demand body/file load; no foreground skill-authoring tool; multi-file bundled skills never told their base dir so relative paths are unreachable.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Description-in-context + a Skill tool that loads body/files on demand; expose skill base dir; foreground skill_manage tool.

confirmed_gaps.title: Downloaded tarball content hash never verified; no static security scan of installed skills
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: content hash is fetched but never verified; no local static scan (openclaw skill-scanner.ts / hermes skills_guard.py have no counterpart); Skill model drops whenToUse/paths/platforms/model/effort/hooks frontmatter.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Verify tarball hash on install + a static scan pass; parse the dropped frontmatter fields.

confirmed_gaps.title: No skill-as-slash-command bridge; register_command extension point has zero production callers
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: hermes /skill-name loads skills into a turn — corlinman has zero; runtime register_command() exists but no production callers, so plugin/skill commands never reach the registry.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Bridge skills/plugins into the command registry via register_command at load time.

confirmed_gaps.title: No unknown-command notice (unrecognized /foo silently forwarded to the LLM)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: unrecognized /foo is forwarded to the LLM as chat text with no notice.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Detect leading-slash-not-in-registry and emit an unknown-command hint.

confirmed_gaps.title: Access control is a single global admin env var — no per-scope tier or non-admin allowlist
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: CORLINMAN_COMMAND_ADMINS binary only; no DM-vs-group tier, no user_allowed_commands allowlist (hermes SlashAccessPolicy).
confirmed_gaps.fix: Per-scope command tiers + non-admin allowlist.

confirmed_gaps.title: No session-control slash commands (/clear /reset /new /stop /model /retry)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: the /clear,/reset,/model strings are only Next.js web-composer UI labels + i18n, not channel handlers; no destructive-command confirm gate.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Channel handlers for /clear,/reset,/new,/stop,/model,/retry + a destructive-command confirmation gate.

confirmed_gaps.title: Plugin manifest hooks/skill_refs are parsed-and-ignored; no persisted enable/disable; no marketplace; hot-reload unwired
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: manifest.py:254-255 hooks/skill_refs have zero consumers; no persisted enabled-state across scopes (skill is on-disk or deleted; bundled=409); /admin/plugins toggles only a live McpAdapter, writes nothing durable; plugin manifests have no notify watcher despite the doc claim.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Wire plugin-contributed skills+hooks; persisted enabledPlugins map across user/project/local scopes; restart-surviving enable state; manifest watcher; (marketplace optional).

confirmed_gaps.title: No live vector/semantic recall — vector column never populated, query falls back to BM25
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: LocalSqliteHost.upsert passes None for vector (local_sqlite.py:688); episodes write embedding=NULL; embed sweep only in tests; EPA backfill runs on an empty column; README/CHANGELOG acknowledge 'FTS5 today; HNSW+RRF+rerank on the roadmap'.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Populate embeddings on the live write path + a vector/HNSW query stage with RRF fusion over BM25 + optional cross-encoder rerank.

confirmed_gaps.title: EvolutionApplier flips status/writes audit but never mutates kb/tags/skills; ShadowTester unscheduled; GEPA score_variants dead; no AgentDream
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: applier is store-backed only (real apply lived in the now-deleted Rust crate); ShadowTester has no entrypoint so high-risk reaches operator ungated; score_variants has zero call sites; no free-association dreaming analogue; Darwin effectiveness-half + hill-climbing + LLM diff authoring deferred; no LLM TagMaster.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Materialize approved proposals (mutate kb chunks/tag nodes/skill files); schedule ShadowTester to gate medium/high-risk; wire score_variants. AgentDream/Darwin-effectiveness are larger optional follow-ons.

confirmed_gaps.title: persona.* placeholder mirroring is dead (no resolver on AppState, agent_id never stamped); daily_publish injects no life-state
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: set_state writes state_json but no persona_resolver is published on gateway AppState and _context_metadata never stamps agent_id, so {{persona.life_*}}/{{persona.mood}} resolve empty; bundled grantley prompt uses none of the placeholders; qzone.daily_publish injects no life/diary and binds no persona_id.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Publish a persona_resolver on AppState + stamp agent_id in _context_metadata; add persona.* placeholders to the grantley prompt; bind persona_id + inject life-state into daily_publish.

confirmed_gaps.title: Inbound multimodal dropped on all four text channels (attachments=[])
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: live long-poll/gateway adapters yield attachments=[] so user images/voice/docs are never forwarded (only QQ/OneBot wires inbound); Telegram never parses sticker/video/audio/animation; no sticker vision-description.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Wire inbound attachment extraction on Telegram/Discord/Slack/Feishu; parse Telegram sticker/video/audio; add sticker vision-description. Depends on vision-analyze + multimodal read for downstream use.

confirmed_gaps.title: [MSG_BREAK] multi-bubble token leaks to users (no sender splits on it)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: seeded grantley persona emits [MSG_BREAK] for multi-bubble replies but no sender splits on it, so the literal token leaks; both openclaw bots split.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Split outbound text on [MSG_BREAK] into multiple bubbles in each channel sender.

confirmed_gaps.title: No media-group/album buffering or image+text merge-debounce; no ambient auto-chat / per-chat agent binding
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: no album buffering / merge-debounce; no ambient group auto-chat; no per-chat/per-group agent binding.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Album/merge-debounce buffer; optional ambient group participation + per-chat agent binding.

confirmed_gaps.title: No agent TTS tool, no STT of inbound voice (stub transcript), realtime transcript->chat bridge unwired, no mic client
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: no agent-callable TTS (overlaps text-to-speech-tool); MessageTranscribed fires empty stub; realtime transcript_sink=None; no browser-mic/CLI client connects to /v1/voice; Telegram send_voice exists but nothing generates OGG and no auto-TTS reply.
confirmed_gaps.fix: STT of inbound voice messages + wire transcript_sink to chat + a mic-capture client + an auto-TTS reply path. Shares the TTS tool with builtin-tools.

confirmed_gaps.title: Scheduler run_agent action is wired-but-dead (emits unsupported_action); no channel delivery, catch-up, or rich schedules
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: config loader parses run_agent but dispatcher emits unsupported_action (runner.py:523); no channel delivery; no missed-run catch-up across restarts; only raw cron strings (no 'every 30m'); no webhook triggers.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Implement the run_agent dispatcher branch (run a real agent turn) + channel delivery + catch-up/grace + ergonomic schedule grammar. run_agent is the highest-value item.

confirmed_gaps.title: corlinman-identity is shipped-but-unwired (all /admin/identity* 503); and there is no inbound user-authorization/pairing gate (behind hermes)
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: AdminState.identity_store is Any|None=None (state.py:146) and never assigned; entrypoint never imports corlinman_identity; resolve_or_create never called; redeem never wired to a channel; sweep_expired never scheduled; router.py does keyword+rate-limit only — no allowlist/pairing (any sender on an enabled channel is processed).
confirmed_gaps.fix: (a) Open/assign the identity store + wire resolve_or_create per inbound message + redeem path + schedule sweep; (b) add an authorization/pairing gate (allowlist + DM code pairing, unauthorized_dm_behavior) in the channel router.

confirmed_gaps.title: 8 of 10 Prometheus metric families are defined-but-unwired; OTel spans don't cover loop/tools/subagents
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: only HTTP_REQUESTS + LOG_FILES_REMOVED ever .inc()/.observe() in prod; AGENT_GRPC_INFLIGHT/APPROVALS_TOTAL left as explicit Python TODOs; OTel spans cover only the HTTP/gRPC chat boundary, none inside the reasoning loop/tool dispatch/supervisor; no Langfuse-style per-call export. Cost is token-only (see cost-no-usd-math).
confirmed_gaps.fix: Wire the 8 dormant metric families at their lifecycle points; add reasoning-loop/tool/subagent spans; (optional Langfuse export).

confirmed_gaps.title: Admin config-reload route + variable-cascade hot-reload + ConfigChanged hook are all built-but-disconnected
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: /admin/config/reload and config_swap_fn are dead (admin_b extras never populated with config_watcher/config_swap_fn); the only prod VariableCascade is hot_reload=False and start_watching never called so prompt-fragment edits never go live; ConfigWatcher constructed without hook_emitter/validator so ConfigChanged never fires; /admin/config/schema is a stub.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Populate admin_b extras; construct the prod VariableCascade with hot_reload=True + start_watching; pass hook_emitter+validator into ConfigWatcher; implement the schema route.

confirmed_gaps.title: Canvas Host has no web-UI consumer; chat transcript has no syntax/math/mermaid; no output-styles feature
confirmed_gaps.corlinman_evidence: no /canvas page; UI never hits /v1/canvas (only tests + Swift client); chat uses markdown-message.tsx/artifact-panel.tsx with no highlighting/KaTeX/mermaid (mermaid+markdown previews are 'not yet wired' placeholders); no streaming inline HTML preview or PNG export; claude-code output styles (.claude/output-styles/*.md behavior-reshaping prompts) entirely absent.
confirmed_gaps.fix: Add a /canvas UI consumer + upgrade the chat render path (syntax/KaTeX/mermaid); optional inline HTML preview/PNG export; optional output-styles loader.

subsystems_at_parity: Confined to the SUMMARIES provided, no subsystem is fully gap-free; the closest-to-parity (gaps are edge/orchestration only, inner mechanics solid): agent-loop inner loop, context-compaction A1/A2/A4 (shipped), config-settings ConfigWatcher core (exceeds references), canvas backend Renderer, channels platform breadth (7 platforms), scheduler core (parity with its Rust source), persona-life tool layer (>= hermes), voice server-side realtime gateway (> claude-code reference).
